build.description: Primary coding agent for development work

adversarial-document-reviewer.description: Challenges premises, surfaces unstated assumptions, and stress-tests decisions in high-stakes documents

adversarial-reviewer.description: Constructs failure scenarios to break implementations across component boundaries

agent-native-reviewer.description: Verifies agent-native parity -- any action a user can take, an agent can also take

ankane-readme-writer.description: Creates README files following Ankane-style template for Ruby gems

api-contract-reviewer.description: Detects breaking API contract changes in routes, serializers, and type signatures

architecture-strategist.description: Analyzes architectural decisions and pattern compliance

best-practices-researcher.description: Researches and synthesizes external best practices, documentation, and examples

code-simplicity-reviewer.description: Final pass for simplicity and minimalism -- identifies YAGNI violations and simplification opportunities

coherence-reviewer.description: Reviews documents for internal consistency, contradictions, and terminology drift

correctness-reviewer.description: Reviews code for logic errors, edge cases, state bugs, and error propagation failures

data-integrity-guardian.description: Reviews database migrations, data models, and persistent data code for safety

data-migration-reviewer.description: Reviews migration files, schema dumps, backfills -- schema drift, mapping correctness, deploy-window safety

deployment-verification-agent.description: Produces Go/No-Go deployment checklists with SQL verification queries and rollback procedures

design-implementation-reviewer.description: Visually compares live UI implementation against Figma designs

design-iterator.description: Iteratively refines UI design through screenshot-analyze-improve cycles

design-lens-reviewer.description: Reviews plans for missing design decisions -- information architecture, interaction states, user flows

feasibility-reviewer.description: Evaluates whether proposed technical approaches will survive contact with reality

figma-design-sync.description: Detects and fixes visual differences between web implementation and Figma design

framework-docs-researcher.description: Gathers comprehensive documentation and best practices for frameworks and libraries

git-history-analyzer.description: Performs archaeological analysis of git history to trace code evolution

issue-intelligence-analyst.description: Analyzes GitHub issues to surface recurring themes and pain patterns

julik-frontend-races-reviewer.description: Reviews Stimulus/Turbo/DOM-timing-sensitive frontend code for race conditions

learnings-researcher.description: Searches tunan:solution-labeled feature issues for applicable past learnings

maintainability-reviewer.description: Reviews code for structural quality, coupling, naming, dead code, and abstraction debt

pattern-recognition-specialist.description: Analyzes code for design patterns, anti-patterns, naming conventions, and duplication

performance-oracle.description: Analyzes code for performance bottlenecks, algorithmic complexity, and scalability

performance-reviewer.description: Reviews code for runtime performance and scalability issues with confidence calibration

pr-comment-resolver.description: Evaluates and resolves PR review threads -- assesses validity, implements fixes

previous-comments-reviewer.description: Checks whether prior PR review feedback has been addressed in the current diff

product-lens-reviewer.description: Challenges problem framing, evaluates scope decisions, and surfaces goal misalignment

project-standards-reviewer.description: Audits changes against the project's own AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md standards

reliability-reviewer.description: Reviews code for production reliability -- error handling, retries, timeouts, background jobs

repo-research-analyst.description: Conducts thorough research on repository structure, documentation, conventions, and patterns

scope-guardian-reviewer.description: Challenges unjustified complexity, scope creep, and premature abstractions

security-lens-reviewer.description: Evaluates plans for security gaps -- auth/authz assumptions, data exposure, API vulnerabilities

security-reviewer.description: Reviews code for exploitable vulnerabilities -- auth, user input, permissions

security-sentinel.description: Performs security audits for vulnerabilities, OWASP compliance, and hardcoded secrets

session-historian.description: Synthesizes findings from prior coding-agent sessions about the same problem or topic

slack-researcher.description: Searches Slack for organizational context -- decisions, constraints, and discussions

spec-flow-analyzer.description: Analyzes specifications and feature descriptions for user flow completeness and gap identification

swift-ios-reviewer.description: Reviews Swift/iOS code -- SwiftUI state, retain cycles, concurrency, Core Data threading

testing-reviewer.description: Reviews code for test coverage gaps, weak assertions, and brittle tests

web-researcher.description: Performs iterative web research and returns structured external grounding

agent-native-architecture.description: Build applications where agents are first-class citizens
agent-native-architecture.template:
Load the tunan:agent-native-architecture skill and follow its instructions.
